key.name: whisper-clipboard-toggle
key.description: Start/stop audio recording for whisper transcription

key.name: whisper-cancel-toggle
key.description: Cancel ongoing audio recording without transcribing

key.name: whisper-language
key.description: Language code passed to whisper-server per request (e.g. en, it, fr)

key.name: auto-detect-language
key.description: Let whisper-server auto-detect the spoken language (per-request, no server restart needed)

key.name: translate-to-english
key.description: Translate the transcribed audio to English

key.name: whisper-model
key.description: Path to the whisper.cpp GGML model file

key.name: whisper-models-dir
key.description: Additional directory to search for GGML model files. Leave empty to use the default search paths.

key.name: whisper-server-bin
key.description: Full path to the whisper-server binary. Leave empty to auto-detect from PATH and common locations.

key.name: server-host
key.description: IP address or hostname of the whisper-server. Use 127.0.0.1 for the local auto-managed server, or set a remote host to connect to an external whisper-server without spawning a local process.

key.name: server-port
key.description: Port for the whisper-server HTTP backend

key.name: auto-paste
key.description: Automatically paste transcribed text into the focused application

key.name: paste-use-ctrl-shift-v
key.description: Use Ctrl+Shift+V instead of Ctrl+V (for terminal apps)

key.name: history-size
key.description: Maximum number of past transcriptions to keep (1–50)

key.name: history
key.description: Persisted list of recent transcriptions (oldest first)

key.name: push-to-talk
key.description: Hold the shortcut key to record, release to transcribe
